creator: volkomorov@inbox.ru
text:
After CVSUP, new port i can't build of ffmpeg.
When i make /usr/ports/multimedia/ffmpeg, i have
===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
===>  Extracting for ffmpeg-2007.07.12_1
=> MD5 Checksum OK for ffmpeg-2007-07-12.tar.bz2.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for ffmpeg-2007-07-12.tar.bz2.
===>  Patching for ffmpeg-2007.07.12_1
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for ffmpeg-2007.07.12_1
sed: /usr/ports/multimedia/ffmpeg/work/ffmpeg-2007-07-12/libavcodec/x264.c: No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/multimedia/ffmpeg.

How-To-Repeat: /usr/ports/multimedia/ffmpeg
make
